## Task
Scaffold and beautify the existing `index.html` as a **GitHub Copilot Across Surfaces** overview page with:
- Title: **GitHub Copilot Across Surfaces**
- A brief introduction explaining the four Copilot surfaces (GitHub.com, IDE, CLI, SDK)
- Two navigation buttons that link to the child pages:
  - **Primitives** → `primitives.html`
  - **Agentic Platform Engineering** → `ape.html`

Source reference: https://www.dailydoseofghcp.com/posts/ghcp-across-multiple-surfaces.html

The blank HTML files (`index.html`, `primitives.html`, `ape.html`) already exist in the repo — no need to create the folder structure.

## Assigned to
GitHub Coding Agent — assign this issue to Copilot via the Assignees panel on GitHub.com.
